---
title: "ICA2_MP8_analysis"
author: "Jiayao"
date: "2026-05-15"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

### Preparation

```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(Matrix)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(patchwork)
library(celda)
library(SoupX)
library(mclust)
library(aricode)

set.seed(12345)

dir.create("figures", showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create("results/qc", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

data_dir <- "data/PBMC4K_filtered"

list.files(data_dir)

counts <- Read10X(data.dir = data_dir)

dim(counts)
head(rownames(counts))
head(colnames(counts))
```

The files are okay.

### QC and UMAP

```{r}
pbmc <- CreateSeuratObject(
  counts = counts,
  project = "PBMC4K",
  min.cells = 3,
  min.features = 200
)

pbmc[["percent.mt"]] <- PercentageFeatureSet(pbmc, pattern = "^MT-")

qc_summary_before <- data.frame(
  n_cells = ncol(pbmc),
  median_nFeature_RNA = median(pbmc$nFeature_RNA),
  median_nCount_RNA = median(pbmc$nCount_RNA),
  median_percent_mt = median(pbmc$percent.mt)
)

qc_summary_before

p_qc <- VlnPlot(
  pbmc,
  features = c("nFeature_RNA", "nCount_RNA", "percent.mt"),
  ncol = 3
)

ggsave(
  "figures/FigS1_QC_before_filtering.png",
  p_qc,
  width = 10,
  height = 4,
  dpi = 300
)

pbmc <- subset(
  pbmc,
  subset = nFeature_RNA >= 200 &
           nFeature_RNA <= 3000 &
           nCount_RNA <= 20000 &
           percent.mt <= 10
)

qc_summary_after <- data.frame(
  n_cells = ncol(pbmc),
  median_nFeature_RNA = median(pbmc$nFeature_RNA),
  median_nCount_RNA = median(pbmc$nCount_RNA),
  median_percent_mt = median(pbmc$percent.mt)
)

qc_summary_after

pbmc <- NormalizeData(
  pbmc,
  normalization.method = "LogNormalize",
  scale.factor = 10000
)

pbmc <- FindVariableFeatures(
  pbmc,
  selection.method = "vst",
  nfeatures = 2000
)

pbmc <- ScaleData(pbmc, features = rownames(pbmc))

pbmc <- RunPCA(
  pbmc,
  features = VariableFeatures(pbmc)
)

theme_white <- theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
    legend.key = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA)
  )

p_elbow <- ElbowPlot(pbmc, ndims = 30) +
  theme_white +
  ggtitle("Elbow plot for clean PBMC baseline")

ggsave(
  "figures/FigS2_ElbowPlot.png",
  p_elbow,
  width = 5,
  height = 4,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

pbmc <- FindNeighbors(pbmc, dims = 1:15)
pbmc <- FindClusters(pbmc, resolution = 0.7)
pbmc <- RunUMAP(pbmc, dims = 1:15)

p_umap_clean <- DimPlot(
  pbmc,
  reduction = "umap",
  label = TRUE
) + ggtitle("Clean PBMC baseline clusters")

ggsave(
  "figures/FigS3_Clean_PBMC_UMAP.png",
  p_umap_clean,
  width = 6,
  height = 5,
  dpi = 300
)

saveRDS(pbmc, "results/qc/pbmc_clean_seurat.rds")
```

### Marker sanity check

```{r}
# Prepare working space
dir.create("results/qc", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create("figures", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

theme_white <- theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA),
    legend.key = element_rect(fill = "white", colour = NA)
  )
# Marker sanity check
marker_genes_all <- c(
  # T cells
  "CD3D", "CD3E", "TRAC", "IL7R", "CCR7", "LTB",
  
  # B cells
  "MS4A1", "CD79A", "CD79B", "CD74",
  
  # NK cells
  "NKG7", "GNLY", "KLRD1", "GZMB",
  
  # Monocytes
  "LYZ", "S100A8", "S100A9", "FCGR3A", "MS4A7", "CST3",
  
  # Dendritic cells
  "FCER1A", "CLEC10A",
  
  # Platelet / megakaryocyte-like signal
  "PPBP", "PF4"
)

marker_genes <- intersect(marker_genes_all, rownames(pbmc))
missing_markers <- setdiff(marker_genes_all, rownames(pbmc))

marker_genes
missing_markers

p_marker_dot <- DotPlot(
  pbmc,
  features = marker_genes
) +
  RotatedAxis() +
  theme_white +
  ggtitle("Canonical PBMC marker expression across clean clusters")

ggsave(
  "figures/FigS4_Clean_marker_dotplot.png",
  p_marker_dot,
  width = 12,
  height = 5,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

p_marker_dot

all_markers <- FindAllMarkers(
  pbmc,
  only.pos = TRUE,
  min.pct = 0.25,
  logfc.threshold = 0.25
)

write.csv(
  all_markers,
  "results/qc/clean_cluster_all_markers.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

fc_col <- intersect(c("avg_log2FC", "avg_logFC"), colnames(all_markers))[1]

top10_markers <- all_markers %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = .data[[fc_col]], n = 10) %>%
  ungroup()

write.csv(
  top10_markers,
  "results/qc/clean_cluster_top10_markers.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

head(top10_markers, 20)


```

### Controlled ambient RNA simulation

```{r}
# Prepare clean counts and cluster labels
dir.create("results/simulated", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create("results/metrics", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create("figures", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

get_assay_data <- function(obj, layer_name = "counts") {
  tryCatch(
    GetAssayData(obj, assay = "RNA", layer = layer_name),
    error = function(e) GetAssayData(obj, assay = "RNA", slot = layer_name)
  )
}

clean_counts <- get_assay_data(pbmc, "counts")
clean_norm <- get_assay_data(pbmc, "data")

clean_clusters <- as.character(Idents(pbmc))
names(clean_clusters) <- colnames(pbmc)

dim(clean_counts)
table(clean_clusters)

# Automatically search for monocyte-like source clusters
monocyte_markers <- intersect(
  c("LYZ", "S100A8", "S100A9", "FCGR3A", "MS4A7", "CST3"),
  rownames(pbmc)
)

monocyte_markers

if (length(monocyte_markers) < 3) {
  stop("Too few monocyte marker genes found in the dataset.")
}

cluster_ids <- levels(Idents(pbmc))

monocyte_source_scores <- do.call(
  rbind,
  lapply(cluster_ids, function(cl) {
    cells <- names(clean_clusters)[clean_clusters == cl]
    
    marker_mat <- clean_norm[monocyte_markers, cells, drop = FALSE]
    
    data.frame(
      cluster = cl,
      n_cells = length(cells),
      monocyte_marker_score = mean(Matrix::rowMeans(marker_mat))
    )
  })
)

monocyte_source_scores <- monocyte_source_scores %>%
  arrange(desc(monocyte_marker_score))

write.csv(
  monocyte_source_scores,
  "results/simulated/monocyte_source_cluster_scores.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

monocyte_source_scores

source_cluster <- monocyte_source_scores$cluster[1]
source_cells <- names(clean_clusters)[clean_clusters == source_cluster]

source_cluster
length(source_cells)

# Check out the top soup genes of this source cluster
source_gene_sums <- Matrix::rowSums(clean_counts[, source_cells, drop = FALSE])

source_profile_df <- data.frame(
  gene = names(source_gene_sums),
  source_counts = as.numeric(source_gene_sums)
) %>%
  filter(source_counts > 0) %>%
  arrange(desc(source_counts))

source_profile_df$rank <- seq_len(nrow(source_profile_df))

write.csv(
  head(source_profile_df, 200),
  "results/simulated/source_cluster_top200_soup_genes.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

head(source_profile_df, 30)

# Define ambient RNA simulation function
simulate_ambient_from_source <- function(
    counts,
    source_cells,
    source_cluster,
    soup_gene_n = 100,
    mean_frac = 0.05,
    seed = 1,
    concentration = 80
) {
  set.seed(seed)
  
  counts <- as(counts, "dgCMatrix")
  source_cells <- intersect(source_cells, colnames(counts))
  
  if (length(source_cells) == 0) {
    stop("No source cells found in the count matrix.")
  }
  
  source_profile <- Matrix::rowSums(counts[, source_cells, drop = FALSE])
  candidate_genes <- names(source_profile)[source_profile > 0]
  
  soup_genes <- names(sort(source_profile[candidate_genes], decreasing = TRUE))[
    seq_len(min(soup_gene_n, length(candidate_genes)))
  ]
  
  soup_idx <- match(soup_genes, rownames(counts))
  
  soup_prob <- as.numeric(source_profile[soup_genes])
  soup_prob <- soup_prob / sum(soup_prob)
  
  n_cells <- ncol(counts)
  
  # Cell-specific contamination fraction.
  # Mean is around mean_frac, but each cell has small variation.
  alpha <- max(mean_frac * concentration, 0.1)
  beta <- max((1 - mean_frac) * concentration, 0.1)
  
  rho_cell <- rbeta(n_cells, alpha, beta)
  rho_cell <- pmin(pmax(rho_cell, 0.001), 0.6)
  names(rho_cell) <- colnames(counts)
  
  native_umi <- Matrix::colSums(counts)
  ambient_umi <- as.integer(round(rho_cell / (1 - rho_cell) * native_umi))
  
  ii_list <- vector("list", n_cells)
  jj_list <- vector("list", n_cells)
  xx_list <- vector("list", n_cells)
  
  for (j in seq_len(n_cells)) {
    if (ambient_umi[j] > 0) {
      draw <- as.vector(rmultinom(1, size = ambient_umi[j], prob = soup_prob))
      nz <- which(draw > 0)
      
      ii_list[[j]] <- soup_idx[nz]
      jj_list[[j]] <- rep(j, length(nz))
      xx_list[[j]] <- draw[nz]
    }
  }
  
  ambient_mat <- Matrix::sparseMatrix(
    i = unlist(ii_list),
    j = unlist(jj_list),
    x = unlist(xx_list),
    dims = dim(counts),
    dimnames = dimnames(counts)
  )
  
  contaminated <- counts + ambient_mat
  
  true_frac <- Matrix::colSums(ambient_mat) / Matrix::colSums(contaminated)
  names(true_frac) <- colnames(counts)
  
  list(
    contaminated = contaminated,
    ambient = ambient_mat,
    true_frac = true_frac,
    target_frac = mean_frac,
    soup_gene_n = soup_gene_n,
    soup_genes = soup_genes,
    source_cluster = source_cluster,
    source_n_cells = length(source_cells)
  )
}

# Generate 8 contaminated scenarios
scenarios <- expand.grid(
  soup_gene_n = c(1, 100),
  mean_frac = c(0.02, 0.05, 0.10, 0.20)
)

sim_list <- list()
sim_summary <- data.frame()

for (i in seq_len(nrow(scenarios))) {
  s <- scenarios[i, ]
  
  frac_label <- gsub("\\.", "p", sprintf("%.2f", s$mean_frac))
  
  scenario_name <- paste0(
    "sourceCluster", source_cluster,
    "_genes", s$soup_gene_n,
    "_frac", frac_label
  )
  
  message("Simulating scenario: ", scenario_name)
  
  sim <- simulate_ambient_from_source(
    counts = clean_counts,
    source_cells = source_cells,
    source_cluster = source_cluster,
    soup_gene_n = s$soup_gene_n,
    mean_frac = s$mean_frac,
    seed = 1000 + i
  )
  
  sim_list[[scenario_name]] <- sim
  
  sim_summary <- rbind(
    sim_summary,
    data.frame(
      scenario = scenario_name,
      source_cluster = source_cluster,
      source_n_cells = length(source_cells),
      soup_gene_n = s$soup_gene_n,
      target_frac = s$mean_frac,
      actual_mean_frac = mean(sim$true_frac),
      actual_sd_frac = sd(sim$true_frac),
      min_frac = min(sim$true_frac),
      max_frac = max(sim$true_frac),
      total_added_umis = sum(Matrix::colSums(sim$ambient)),
      top_soup_genes = paste(head(sim$soup_genes, 10), collapse = ";")
    )
  )
}

saveRDS(
  sim_list,
  "results/simulated/simulated_ambient_datasets.rds"
)

write.csv(
  sim_summary,
  "results/simulated/simulation_summary.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

sim_summary

# Draw a real distribution map of contaminated proportions
true_frac_df <- do.call(
  rbind,
  lapply(names(sim_list), function(name) {
    sim <- sim_list[[name]]
    
    data.frame(
      scenario = name,
      soup_gene_n = sim$soup_gene_n,
      target_frac = sim$target_frac,
      true_ambient_fraction = as.numeric(sim$true_frac)
    )
  })
)

p_true_frac_dist <- ggplot(
  true_frac_df,
  aes(x = true_ambient_fraction)
) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 40) +
  facet_grid(
    rows = vars(soup_gene_n),
    cols = vars(target_frac),
    labeller = label_both
  ) +
  theme_white +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of simulated ambient RNA fractions",
    x = "True ambient RNA fraction per cell",
    y = "Number of cells"
  )

ggsave(
  "figures/FigS5_Simulated_true_ambient_fraction_distribution.png",
  p_true_frac_dist,
  width = 12,
  height = 5,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

p_true_frac_dist

```

### No-correction baseline

```{r}
dir.create("results/metrics", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create("figures", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# If objects are not in memory, reload them
if (!exists("sim_list")) {
  sim_list <- readRDS("results/simulated/simulated_ambient_datasets.rds")
}

if (!exists("clean_counts")) {
  clean_counts <- get_assay_data(pbmc, "counts")
}

clean_clusters <- as.character(Idents(pbmc))
names(clean_clusters) <- colnames(pbmc)

if (!exists("monocyte_source_scores")) {
  monocyte_source_scores <- read.csv(
    "results/simulated/monocyte_source_cluster_scores.csv",
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

monocyte_source_scores$cluster <- as.character(monocyte_source_scores$cluster)

# Exclude the top monocyte-like clusters when measuring marker leakage
monocyte_like_clusters <- monocyte_source_scores$cluster[
  seq_len(min(3, nrow(monocyte_source_scores)))
]

recipient_cells <- names(clean_clusters)[
  !(clean_clusters %in% monocyte_like_clusters)
]

monocyte_like_clusters
length(recipient_cells)

# Define the error calculation function
# The function is used to compare two count matrix: clean_counts and contaminated_counts
calc_rmse_sparse <- function(a, b, genes = NULL, cells = NULL) {
  if (!is.null(genes)) {
    genes <- intersect(genes, rownames(a))
    a <- a[genes, , drop = FALSE]
    b <- b[genes, , drop = FALSE]
  }
  
  if (!is.null(cells)) {
    cells <- intersect(cells, colnames(a))
    a <- a[, cells, drop = FALSE]
    b <- b[, cells, drop = FALSE]
  }
  
  d <- a - b
  sqrt(sum(d@x^2) / (nrow(d) * ncol(d)))
}

calc_mae_sparse <- function(a, b, genes = NULL, cells = NULL) {
  if (!is.null(genes)) {
    genes <- intersect(genes, rownames(a))
    a <- a[genes, , drop = FALSE]
    b <- b[genes, , drop = FALSE]
  }
  
  if (!is.null(cells)) {
    cells <- intersect(cells, colnames(a))
    a <- a[, cells, drop = FALSE]
    b <- b[, cells, drop = FALSE]
  }
  
  d <- a - b
  sum(abs(d@x)) / (nrow(d) * ncol(d))
}

calc_mean_marker_counts <- function(mat, genes, cells) {
  genes <- intersect(genes, rownames(mat))
  cells <- intersect(cells, colnames(mat))
  
  if (length(genes) == 0 || length(cells) == 0) {
    return(NA_real_)
  }
  
  mean(Matrix::colSums(mat[genes, cells, drop = FALSE]) / length(genes))
}

# no-correction baseline metrics
# If there is a significant difference between soup_gene_n = 1 and soup_gene_n = 100, it indicates that the "number of contamination genes" does indeed affect the downstream signal.
hvg500 <- head(VariableFeatures(pbmc), 500)

monocyte_leakage_genes <- intersect(
  c("LYZ", "S100A8", "S100A9", "FCGR3A", "MS4A7", "CST3"),
  rownames(clean_counts)
)

monocyte_leakage_genes

no_correction_metrics <- data.frame()

for (name in names(sim_list)) {
  message("Calculating no-correction metrics for: ", name)
  
  sim <- sim_list[[name]]
  
  contaminated_counts <- sim$contaminated
  
  # Align rows and columns just in case
  common_genes <- intersect(rownames(clean_counts), rownames(contaminated_counts))
  common_cells <- intersect(colnames(clean_counts), colnames(contaminated_counts))
  
  clean_aligned <- clean_counts[common_genes, common_cells, drop = FALSE]
  contaminated_aligned <- contaminated_counts[common_genes, common_cells, drop = FALSE]
  
  soup_genes <- intersect(sim$soup_genes, rownames(clean_aligned))
  
  clean_marker_leakage <- calc_mean_marker_counts(
    clean_aligned,
    genes = monocyte_leakage_genes,
    cells = recipient_cells
  )
  
  contaminated_marker_leakage <- calc_mean_marker_counts(
    contaminated_aligned,
    genes = monocyte_leakage_genes,
    cells = recipient_cells
  )
  
  clean_soup_gene_signal <- calc_mean_marker_counts(
    clean_aligned,
    genes = soup_genes,
    cells = recipient_cells
  )
  
  contaminated_soup_gene_signal <- calc_mean_marker_counts(
    contaminated_aligned,
    genes = soup_genes,
    cells = recipient_cells
  )
  
  no_correction_metrics <- rbind(
    no_correction_metrics,
    data.frame(
      scenario = name,
      source_cluster = sim$source_cluster,
      soup_gene_n = sim$soup_gene_n,
      target_frac = sim$target_frac,
      actual_mean_frac = mean(sim$true_frac),
      actual_sd_frac = sd(sim$true_frac),
      
      rmse_all_genes = calc_rmse_sparse(clean_aligned, contaminated_aligned),
      mae_all_genes = calc_mae_sparse(clean_aligned, contaminated_aligned),
      
      rmse_hvg500 = calc_rmse_sparse(
        clean_aligned,
        contaminated_aligned,
        genes = hvg500
      ),
      mae_hvg500 = calc_mae_sparse(
        clean_aligned,
        contaminated_aligned,
        genes = hvg500
      ),
      
      rmse_soup_genes = calc_rmse_sparse(
        clean_aligned,
        contaminated_aligned,
        genes = soup_genes
      ),
      mae_soup_genes = calc_mae_sparse(
        clean_aligned,
        contaminated_aligned,
        genes = soup_genes
      ),
      
      clean_marker_leakage = clean_marker_leakage,
      contaminated_marker_leakage = contaminated_marker_leakage,
      marker_leakage_increase = contaminated_marker_leakage - clean_marker_leakage,
      marker_leakage_ratio = contaminated_marker_leakage / clean_marker_leakage,
      
      clean_soup_gene_signal = clean_soup_gene_signal,
      contaminated_soup_gene_signal = contaminated_soup_gene_signal,
      soup_gene_signal_increase = contaminated_soup_gene_signal - clean_soup_gene_signal,
      
      mean_added_umis_per_cell = mean(Matrix::colSums(sim$ambient)),
      total_added_umis = sum(Matrix::colSums(sim$ambient)),
      top_soup_genes = paste(head(sim$soup_genes, 10), collapse = ";")
    )
  )
}

write.csv(
  no_correction_metrics,
  "results/metrics/no_correction_metrics.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

no_correction_metrics

# Draw the no-correction baseline graph
p_error <- ggplot(
  no_correction_metrics,
  aes(
    x = actual_mean_frac,
    y = rmse_hvg500,
    group = factor(soup_gene_n),
    shape = factor(soup_gene_n)
  )
) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_line() +
  theme_white +
  labs(
    title = "Count-level error without ambient RNA correction",
    x = "Mean simulated ambient RNA fraction",
    y = "RMSE on top 500 highly variable genes",
    shape = "Ambient genes"
  )

p_marker_leakage <- ggplot(
  no_correction_metrics,
  aes(
    x = actual_mean_frac,
    y = marker_leakage_increase,
    group = factor(soup_gene_n),
    shape = factor(soup_gene_n)
  )
) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_line() +
  theme_white +
  labs(
    title = "Monocyte marker leakage without correction",
    x = "Mean simulated ambient RNA fraction",
    y = "Increase in monocyte marker counts",
    shape = "Ambient genes"
  )

p_no_correction <- p_error | p_marker_leakage

ggsave(
  "figures/FigS6_No_correction_baseline_metrics.png",
  p_no_correction,
  width = 12,
  height = 4.5,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

p_no_correction
```

```{r}
# clustering impact
# ARI tool
if (!requireNamespace("mclust", quietly = TRUE)) {
  install.packages("mclust")
}

library(mclust)

# Seurat workflow of contaminated data
# Redo on the contaminated matrix: Normalization, Variable feature selection, PCA, Clustering, UMAP
run_seurat_basic <- function(counts, project_name) {
  obj <- CreateSeuratObject(
    counts = counts,
    project = project_name,
    min.cells = 0,
    min.features = 0
  )
  
  obj <- NormalizeData(
    obj,
    normalization.method = "LogNormalize",
    scale.factor = 10000,
    verbose = FALSE
  )
  
  obj <- FindVariableFeatures(
    obj,
    selection.method = "vst",
    nfeatures = 2000,
    verbose = FALSE
  )
  
  obj <- ScaleData(
    obj,
    features = VariableFeatures(obj),
    verbose = FALSE
  )
  
  obj <- RunPCA(
    obj,
    features = VariableFeatures(obj),
    verbose = FALSE
  )
  
  obj <- FindNeighbors(obj, dims = 1:15, verbose = FALSE)
  obj <- FindClusters(obj, resolution = 0.7, verbose = FALSE)
  obj <- RunUMAP(obj, dims = 1:15, verbose = FALSE)
  
  obj
}

# Calculate the ARI of contaminated clustering and clean clustering
# ARI: The closer ARI is to 1, the more consistent it is between contaminated clustering and clean clustering.
# The ARI decreases with the contamination ratio, indicating that ambient RNA affects clustering.
no_correction_cluster_metrics <- data.frame()
contaminated_cluster_labels <- list()

example_candidates <- names(sim_list)[
  grepl("genes100", names(sim_list)) & grepl("frac0p10", names(sim_list))
]

example_name <- example_candidates[1]
example_obj <- NULL

for (name in names(sim_list)) {
  message("Running contaminated clustering for: ", name)
  
  sim <- sim_list[[name]]
  
  contam_obj <- run_seurat_basic(
    counts = sim$contaminated,
    project_name = paste0("NoCorrection_", name)
  )
  
  contaminated_clusters <- as.character(Idents(contam_obj))
  names(contaminated_clusters) <- colnames(contam_obj)
  
  common_cells <- intersect(names(clean_clusters), names(contaminated_clusters))
  
  ari_value <- mclust::adjustedRandIndex(
    clean_clusters[common_cells],
    contaminated_clusters[common_cells]
  )
  
  no_correction_cluster_metrics <- rbind(
    no_correction_cluster_metrics,
    data.frame(
      scenario = name,
      soup_gene_n = sim$soup_gene_n,
      target_frac = sim$target_frac,
      actual_mean_frac = mean(sim$true_frac),
      clean_n_clusters = length(unique(clean_clusters[common_cells])),
      contaminated_n_clusters = length(unique(contaminated_clusters[common_cells])),
      ARI_vs_clean = ari_value
    )
  )
  
  contaminated_cluster_labels[[name]] <- contaminated_clusters
  
  if (!is.na(example_name) && name == example_name) {
    example_obj <- contam_obj
    example_obj$true_ambient_fraction <- sim$true_frac[colnames(example_obj)]
  }
}

write.csv(
  no_correction_cluster_metrics,
  "results/metrics/no_correction_cluster_metrics.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

saveRDS(
  contaminated_cluster_labels,
  "results/metrics/no_correction_contaminated_cluster_labels.rds"
)

no_correction_cluster_metrics

# Draw clustering impact graph
# Answer: Will ambient RNA change clustering?
# Is clustering more unstable as contamination intensifies?
# Does 1 gene have a different impact on clustering compared to 100 genes?
p_ari <- ggplot(
  no_correction_cluster_metrics,
  aes(
    x = actual_mean_frac,
    y = ARI_vs_clean,
    group = factor(soup_gene_n),
    shape = factor(soup_gene_n)
  )
) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_line() +
  theme_white +
  labs(
    title = "Clustering stability without ambient RNA correction",
    x = "Mean simulated ambient RNA fraction",
    y = "ARI compared with clean clustering",
    shape = "Ambient genes"
  )

ggsave(
  "figures/FigS7_No_correction_clustering_ARI.png",
  p_ari,
  width = 6,
  height = 4.5,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

p_ari

# contaminated example UMAP
# 100 ambient genes
# 10% contamination
# supplementary figure (pending)
if (!is.null(example_obj)) {
  p_example_cluster <- DimPlot(
    example_obj,
    reduction = "umap",
    label = TRUE
  ) +
    theme_white +
    ggtitle("Contaminated PBMC clusters\n100 ambient genes, 10% target contamination")
  
  umap_df <- as.data.frame(Embeddings(example_obj, "umap"))
  colnames(umap_df)[1:2] <- c("UMAP_1", "UMAP_2")
  umap_df$true_ambient_fraction <- example_obj$true_ambient_fraction
  
  p_example_frac <- ggplot(
    umap_df,
    aes(
      x = UMAP_1,
      y = UMAP_2,
      color = true_ambient_fraction
    )
  ) +
    geom_point(size = 0.5) +
    theme_white +
    labs(
      title = "Ground-truth ambient RNA fraction",
      color = "True fraction"
    )
  
  p_example_umap <- p_example_cluster | p_example_frac
  
  ggsave(
    "figures/FigS8_No_correction_contaminated_example_UMAP.png",
    p_example_umap,
    width = 12,
    height = 5,
    dpi = 300,
    bg = "white"
  )
  
  saveRDS(
    example_obj,
    "results/simulated/no_correction_example_genes100_frac0p10_seurat.rds"
  )
  
  p_example_umap
}

# revised no-correction figure showing single-gene effects
# supplementary(pending)
p_rmse_all <- ggplot(
  no_correction_metrics,
  aes(
    x = actual_mean_frac,
    y = rmse_all_genes,
    group = factor(soup_gene_n),
    shape = factor(soup_gene_n)
  )
) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_line() +
  theme_white +
  labs(
    title = "Global count error without correction",
    x = "Mean simulated ambient RNA fraction",
    y = "RMSE across all genes",
    shape = "Ambient genes"
  )

p_rmse_soup <- ggplot(
  no_correction_metrics,
  aes(
    x = actual_mean_frac,
    y = rmse_soup_genes,
    group = factor(soup_gene_n),
    shape = factor(soup_gene_n)
  )
) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_line() +
  theme_white +
  labs(
    title = "Error on ambient-source genes",
    x = "Mean simulated ambient RNA fraction",
    y = "RMSE on soup genes",
    shape = "Ambient genes"
  )

p_soup_signal <- ggplot(
  no_correction_metrics,
  aes(
    x = actual_mean_frac,
    y = soup_gene_signal_increase,
    group = factor(soup_gene_n),
    shape = factor(soup_gene_n)
  )
) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_line() +
  theme_white +
  labs(
    title = "Soup-gene signal increase in recipient cells",
    x = "Mean simulated ambient RNA fraction",
    y = "Increase in soup-gene counts",
    shape = "Ambient genes"
  )

p_marker_leakage_revised <- ggplot(
  no_correction_metrics,
  aes(
    x = actual_mean_frac,
    y = marker_leakage_increase,
    group = factor(soup_gene_n),
    shape = factor(soup_gene_n)
  )
) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_line() +
  theme_white +
  labs(
    title = "Monocyte-marker leakage",
    x = "Mean simulated ambient RNA fraction",
    y = "Increase in monocyte marker counts",
    shape = "Ambient genes"
  )

p_no_correction_revised <- (p_rmse_all | p_rmse_soup) /
  (p_soup_signal | p_marker_leakage_revised)

ggsave(
  "figures/FigS6b_No_correction_metrics_revised.png",
  p_no_correction_revised,
  width = 12,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

p_no_correction_revised
```

### DecontX benchmarking

```{r}
library(celda)

dir.create("results/decontx", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create("figures", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

if (!exists("sim_list")) {
  sim_list <- readRDS("results/simulated/simulated_ambient_datasets.rds")
}

if (!exists("contaminated_cluster_labels")) {
  contaminated_cluster_labels <- readRDS(
    "results/metrics/no_correction_contaminated_cluster_labels.rds"
  )
}

if (!exists("no_correction_metrics")) {
  no_correction_metrics <- read.csv(
    "results/metrics/no_correction_metrics.csv",
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

if (!exists("clean_counts")) {
  clean_counts <- get_assay_data(pbmc, "counts")
}

clean_clusters <- as.character(Idents(pbmc))
names(clean_clusters) <- colnames(pbmc)

test_name <- names(sim_list)[
  grepl("genes100", names(sim_list)) &
    grepl("frac0p10", names(sim_list))
][1]

test_name

test_sim <- sim_list[[test_name]]

test_z <- contaminated_cluster_labels[[test_name]]
test_z <- test_z[colnames(test_sim$contaminated)]

table(test_z)
dim(test_sim$contaminated)
length(test_z)

# DecontX
set.seed(12345)

decontx_test <- decontX(
  x = test_sim$contaminated,
  z = as.character(test_z)
)

decontx_test_counts <- decontx_test$decontXcounts
decontx_test_est <- decontx_test$contamination

# Make sure names match cells
names(decontx_test_est) <- colnames(test_sim$contaminated)

dim(decontx_test_counts)
summary(decontx_test_est)


decontx_detection_df <- data.frame(
  cell = colnames(test_sim$contaminated),
  true_ambient_fraction = as.numeric(test_sim$true_frac),
  decontx_estimated_contamination = as.numeric(decontx_test_est)
)

spearman_test <- cor(
  decontx_detection_df$true_ambient_fraction,
  decontx_detection_df$decontx_estimated_contamination,
  method = "spearman"
)

pearson_test <- cor(
  decontx_detection_df$true_ambient_fraction,
  decontx_detection_df$decontx_estimated_contamination,
  method = "pearson"
)

contam_rmse_test <- sqrt(mean(
  (
    decontx_detection_df$true_ambient_fraction -
      decontx_detection_df$decontx_estimated_contamination
  )^2
))

decontx_detection_metrics_test <- data.frame(
  scenario = test_name,
  true_mean_fraction = mean(decontx_detection_df$true_ambient_fraction),
  decontx_mean_estimate = mean(decontx_detection_df$decontx_estimated_contamination),
  spearman_true_vs_decontx = spearman_test,
  pearson_true_vs_decontx = pearson_test,
  contamination_rmse = contam_rmse_test
)

write.csv(
  decontx_detection_metrics_test,
  "results/decontx/decontx_detection_metrics_test.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

decontx_detection_metrics_test

# Graph
plot_label <- "100 ambient genes, 10% contamination"

p_decontx_scatter <- ggplot(
  decontx_detection_df,
  aes(
    x = true_ambient_fraction,
    y = decontx_estimated_contamination
  )
) +
  geom_point(size = 0.5, alpha = 0.45) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linewidth = 1) +
  theme_white +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 13),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 15),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "DecontX contamination estimate",
    subtitle = paste0(
      plot_label,
      "\nSpearman = ", round(spearman_test, 3),
      "; Pearson = ", round(pearson_test, 3)
    ),
    x = "Ground-truth ambient RNA fraction",
    y = "DecontX estimated contamination"
  )

ggsave(
  "figures/FigS9_DecontX_true_vs_estimated_test.png",
  p_decontx_scatter,
  width = 7,
  height = 5.2,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

p_decontx_scatter

# Figure 10
# Make sure DecontX estimates have cell names
names(decontx_test_est) <- colnames(test_sim$contaminated)

# Extract clean PBMC UMAP coordinates
umap_mat <- Embeddings(pbmc, reduction = "umap")

umap_compare_df <- data.frame(
  cell = rownames(umap_mat),
  UMAP_1 = umap_mat[, 1],
  UMAP_2 = umap_mat[, 2],
  true_ambient_fraction = as.numeric(test_sim$true_frac[rownames(umap_mat)]),
  decontx_estimated_contamination = as.numeric(decontx_test_est[rownames(umap_mat)])
)

# Remove any cells without matched scores
umap_compare_df <- umap_compare_df[
  !is.na(umap_compare_df$true_ambient_fraction) &
    !is.na(umap_compare_df$decontx_estimated_contamination),
]

p_true_umap <- ggplot(
  umap_compare_df,
  aes(
    x = UMAP_1,
    y = UMAP_2,
    color = true_ambient_fraction
  )
) +
  geom_point(size = 0.45, alpha = 0.8) +
  theme_white +
  coord_equal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 11)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Ground-truth ambient RNA fraction",
    subtitle = "Clean PBMC UMAP embedding",
    x = "UMAP 1",
    y = "UMAP 2",
    color = "True\nfraction"
  )

p_est_umap <- ggplot(
  umap_compare_df,
  aes(
    x = UMAP_1,
    y = UMAP_2,
    color = decontx_estimated_contamination
  )
) +
  geom_point(size = 0.45, alpha = 0.8) +
  theme_white +
  coord_equal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 11)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "DecontX estimated contamination",
    subtitle = "Clean PBMC UMAP embedding",
    x = "UMAP 1",
    y = "UMAP 2",
    color = "Estimated\ncontamination"
  )

p_decontx_umap <- p_true_umap | p_est_umap

ggsave(
  "figures/FigS10_DecontX_true_vs_estimated_UMAP_test.png",
  p_decontx_umap,
  width = 12,
  height = 5.2,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

p_decontx_umap



# Ensure decontX counts are sparse matrix
decontx_test_counts <- as(decontx_test_counts, "dgCMatrix")
rownames(decontx_test_counts) <- rownames(test_sim$contaminated)
colnames(decontx_test_counts) <- colnames(test_sim$contaminated)

hvg500 <- head(VariableFeatures(pbmc), 500)

test_soup_genes <- intersect(test_sim$soup_genes, rownames(clean_counts))

baseline_row <- no_correction_metrics[
  no_correction_metrics$scenario == test_name,
]

decontx_rmse_hvg500 <- calc_rmse_sparse(
  clean_counts,
  decontx_test_counts,
  genes = hvg500
)

decontx_rmse_soup_genes <- calc_rmse_sparse(
  clean_counts,
  decontx_test_counts,
  genes = test_soup_genes
)

decontx_rmse_all_genes <- calc_rmse_sparse(
  clean_counts,
  decontx_test_counts
)

monocyte_leakage_decontx <- calc_mean_marker_counts(
  decontx_test_counts,
  genes = monocyte_leakage_genes,
  cells = recipient_cells
)

decontx_correction_metrics_test <- data.frame(
  scenario = test_name,
  
  no_correction_rmse_all_genes = baseline_row$rmse_all_genes,
  decontx_rmse_all_genes = decontx_rmse_all_genes,
  improvement_all_genes = 1 - decontx_rmse_all_genes / baseline_row$rmse_all_genes,
  
  no_correction_rmse_hvg500 = baseline_row$rmse_hvg500,
  decontx_rmse_hvg500 = decontx_rmse_hvg500,
  improvement_hvg500 = 1 - decontx_rmse_hvg500 / baseline_row$rmse_hvg500,
  
  no_correction_rmse_soup_genes = baseline_row$rmse_soup_genes,
  decontx_rmse_soup_genes = decontx_rmse_soup_genes,
  improvement_soup_genes = 1 - decontx_rmse_soup_genes / baseline_row$rmse_soup_genes,
  
  clean_marker_leakage = baseline_row$clean_marker_leakage,
  no_correction_marker_leakage = baseline_row$contaminated_marker_leakage,
  decontx_marker_leakage = monocyte_leakage_decontx,
  marker_leakage_reduction = 1 -
    (monocyte_leakage_decontx - baseline_row$clean_marker_leakage) /
    (baseline_row$contaminated_marker_leakage - baseline_row$clean_marker_leakage)
)

write.csv(
  decontx_correction_metrics_test,
  "results/decontx/decontx_correction_metrics_test.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

decontx_correction_metrics_test

saveRDS(
  list(
    scenario = test_name,
    decontx_result = decontx_test,
    decontx_counts = decontx_test_counts,
    decontx_estimated_contamination = decontx_test_est,
    true_ambient_fraction = test_sim$true_frac
  ),
  "results/decontx/decontx_test_result.rds"
)
```

### Batch DecontX benchmarking across all simulated scenarios

```{r}
library(celda)
library(mclust)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(patchwork)
library(Matrix)

dir.create("results/decontx", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create("results/decontx/per_scenario", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create("figures", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# Reload objects if they are not currently in memory
if (!exists("sim_list")) {
  sim_list <- readRDS("results/simulated/simulated_ambient_datasets.rds")
}

if (!exists("no_correction_metrics")) {
  no_correction_metrics <- read.csv(
    "results/metrics/no_correction_metrics.csv",
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

if (!exists("no_correction_cluster_metrics")) {
  no_correction_cluster_metrics <- read.csv(
    "results/metrics/no_correction_cluster_metrics.csv",
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

if (!exists("contaminated_cluster_labels")) {
  contaminated_cluster_labels <- readRDS(
    "results/metrics/no_correction_contaminated_cluster_labels.rds"
  )
}

if (!exists("clean_counts")) {
  clean_counts <- get_assay_data(pbmc, "counts")
}

clean_clusters <- as.character(Idents(pbmc))
names(clean_clusters) <- colnames(pbmc)

hvg500 <- head(VariableFeatures(pbmc), 500)

monocyte_leakage_genes <- intersect(
  c("LYZ", "S100A8", "S100A9", "FCGR3A", "MS4A7", "CST3"),
  rownames(clean_counts)
)

if (!exists("monocyte_source_scores")) {
  monocyte_source_scores <- read.csv(
    "results/simulated/monocyte_source_cluster_scores.csv",
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

monocyte_source_scores$cluster <- as.character(monocyte_source_scores$cluster)

monocyte_like_clusters <- monocyte_source_scores$cluster[
  seq_len(min(3, nrow(monocyte_source_scores)))
]

recipient_cells <- names(clean_clusters)[
  !(clean_clusters %in% monocyte_like_clusters)
]

safe_improvement <- function(before, after, eps = 1e-12) {
  if (is.na(before) || abs(before) < eps) {
    return(NA_real_)
  }
  1 - after / before
}

safe_reduction <- function(clean_value, contaminated_value, corrected_value, eps = 1e-12) {
  denom <- contaminated_value - clean_value
  if (is.na(denom) || abs(denom) < eps) {
    return(NA_real_)
  }
  1 - (corrected_value - clean_value) / denom
}

to_dgC <- function(x) {
  if (inherits(x, "dgCMatrix")) {
    return(x)
  }
  Matrix::Matrix(x, sparse = TRUE)
}

# Run DecontX for all scenarios

decontx_metrics <- data.frame()
decontx_estimates_all <- list()
decontx_corrected_cluster_labels <- list()

for (name in names(sim_list)) {
  message("============================================================")
  message("Running DecontX for scenario: ", name)
  message("============================================================")
  
  sim <- sim_list[[name]]
  contaminated_counts <- sim$contaminated
  
  # Use contaminated clustering labels as realistic DecontX input
  z <- contaminated_cluster_labels[[name]]
  
  if (is.null(z)) {
    message("No precomputed contaminated cluster labels found. Re-clustering contaminated matrix.")
    
    tmp_obj <- run_seurat_basic(
      counts = contaminated_counts,
      project_name = paste0("Contaminated_", name)
    )
    
    z <- as.character(Idents(tmp_obj))
    names(z) <- colnames(tmp_obj)
  }
  
  z <- z[colnames(contaminated_counts)]
  
  if (any(is.na(z))) {
    stop("Some cells do not have cluster labels in scenario: ", name)
  }
  
  # Run DecontX
  set.seed(12345)
  
  decontx_res <- decontX(
    x = contaminated_counts,
    z = as.character(z)
  )
  
  corrected_counts <- to_dgC(decontx_res$decontXcounts)
  rownames(corrected_counts) <- rownames(contaminated_counts)
  colnames(corrected_counts) <- colnames(contaminated_counts)
  
  decontx_est <- as.numeric(decontx_res$contamination)
  names(decontx_est) <- colnames(contaminated_counts)
  
  true_frac <- as.numeric(sim$true_frac[colnames(contaminated_counts)])
  
  # Detection metrics: can DecontX estimate per-cell contamination?
  spearman_value <- cor(
    true_frac,
    decontx_est,
    method = "spearman",
    use = "complete.obs"
  )
  
  pearson_value <- cor(
    true_frac,
    decontx_est,
    method = "pearson",
    use = "complete.obs"
  )
  
  contamination_rmse <- sqrt(mean((true_frac - decontx_est)^2, na.rm = TRUE))
  
  # Baseline rows
  baseline_row <- no_correction_metrics[
    no_correction_metrics$scenario == name,
  ]
  
  baseline_cluster_row <- no_correction_cluster_metrics[
    no_correction_cluster_metrics$scenario == name,
  ]
  
  if (nrow(baseline_row) != 1) {
    stop("Could not find matching no-correction metrics for scenario: ", name)
  }
  
  if (nrow(baseline_cluster_row) != 1) {
    stop("Could not find matching no-correction cluster metrics for scenario: ", name)
  }
  
  # Correction metrics: does corrected matrix move closer to clean matrix?
  soup_genes <- intersect(sim$soup_genes, rownames(clean_counts))
  
  decontx_rmse_all_genes <- calc_rmse_sparse(
    clean_counts,
    corrected_counts
  )
  
  decontx_mae_all_genes <- calc_mae_sparse(
    clean_counts,
    corrected_counts
  )
  
  decontx_rmse_hvg500 <- calc_rmse_sparse(
    clean_counts,
    corrected_counts,
    genes = hvg500
  )
  
  decontx_mae_hvg500 <- calc_mae_sparse(
    clean_counts,
    corrected_counts,
    genes = hvg500
  )
  
  decontx_rmse_soup_genes <- calc_rmse_sparse(
    clean_counts,
    corrected_counts,
    genes = soup_genes
  )
  
  decontx_mae_soup_genes <- calc_mae_sparse(
    clean_counts,
    corrected_counts,
    genes = soup_genes
  )
  
  decontx_marker_leakage <- calc_mean_marker_counts(
    corrected_counts,
    genes = monocyte_leakage_genes,
    cells = recipient_cells
  )
  
  # Downstream clustering after DecontX correction
  message("Running Seurat clustering on DecontX-corrected counts for: ", name)
  
  corrected_obj <- run_seurat_basic(
    counts = corrected_counts,
    project_name = paste0("DecontX_", name)
  )
  
  corrected_clusters <- as.character(Idents(corrected_obj))
  names(corrected_clusters) <- colnames(corrected_obj)
  
  common_cells <- intersect(names(clean_clusters), names(corrected_clusters))
  
  decontx_ari_vs_clean <- mclust::adjustedRandIndex(
    clean_clusters[common_cells],
    corrected_clusters[common_cells]
  )
  
  # Store metrics
  scenario_metrics <- data.frame(
    scenario = name,
    source_cluster = sim$source_cluster,
    soup_gene_n = sim$soup_gene_n,
    target_frac = sim$target_frac,
    actual_mean_frac = mean(sim$true_frac),
    actual_sd_frac = sd(sim$true_frac),
    
    true_mean_fraction = mean(true_frac, na.rm = TRUE),
    decontx_mean_estimate = mean(decontx_est, na.rm = TRUE),
    decontx_median_estimate = median(decontx_est, na.rm = TRUE),
    spearman_true_vs_decontx = spearman_value,
    pearson_true_vs_decontx = pearson_value,
    contamination_rmse = contamination_rmse,
    
    no_correction_rmse_all_genes = baseline_row$rmse_all_genes,
    decontx_rmse_all_genes = decontx_rmse_all_genes,
    improvement_all_genes = safe_improvement(
      baseline_row$rmse_all_genes,
      decontx_rmse_all_genes
    ),
    
    no_correction_mae_all_genes = baseline_row$mae_all_genes,
    decontx_mae_all_genes = decontx_mae_all_genes,
    improvement_mae_all_genes = safe_improvement(
      baseline_row$mae_all_genes,
      decontx_mae_all_genes
    ),
    
    no_correction_rmse_hvg500 = baseline_row$rmse_hvg500,
    decontx_rmse_hvg500 = decontx_rmse_hvg500,
    improvement_hvg500 = safe_improvement(
      baseline_row$rmse_hvg500,
      decontx_rmse_hvg500
    ),
    
    no_correction_rmse_soup_genes = baseline_row$rmse_soup_genes,
    decontx_rmse_soup_genes = decontx_rmse_soup_genes,
    improvement_soup_genes = safe_improvement(
      baseline_row$rmse_soup_genes,
      decontx_rmse_soup_genes
    ),
    
    clean_marker_leakage = baseline_row$clean_marker_leakage,
    no_correction_marker_leakage = baseline_row$contaminated_marker_leakage,
    decontx_marker_leakage = decontx_marker_leakage,
    marker_leakage_reduction = safe_reduction(
      baseline_row$clean_marker_leakage,
      baseline_row$contaminated_marker_leakage,
      decontx_marker_leakage
    ),
    
    no_correction_ARI_vs_clean = baseline_cluster_row$ARI_vs_clean,
    decontx_ARI_vs_clean = decontx_ari_vs_clean,
    ARI_change_after_decontx = decontx_ari_vs_clean - baseline_cluster_row$ARI_vs_clean,
    corrected_n_clusters = length(unique(corrected_clusters)),
    
    top_soup_genes = paste(head(sim$soup_genes, 10), collapse = ";")
  )
  
  decontx_metrics <- rbind(
    decontx_metrics,
    scenario_metrics
  )
  
  decontx_estimates_all[[name]] <- decontx_est
  decontx_corrected_cluster_labels[[name]] <- corrected_clusters
  
  # Save per-scenario lightweight result
  saveRDS(
    list(
      scenario = name,
      decontx_estimated_contamination = decontx_est,
      true_ambient_fraction = sim$true_frac,
      corrected_cluster_labels = corrected_clusters,
      metrics = scenario_metrics
    ),
    file = paste0(
      "results/decontx/per_scenario/",
      name,
      "_decontx_light_result.rds"
    )
  )
  
  # Save accumulated results after each scenario
  write.csv(
    decontx_metrics,
    "results/decontx/decontx_batch_metrics_partial.csv",
    row.names = FALSE
  )
  
  saveRDS(
    decontx_estimates_all,
    "results/decontx/decontx_estimates_all_partial.rds"
  )
  
  saveRDS(
    decontx_corrected_cluster_labels,
    "results/decontx/decontx_corrected_cluster_labels_partial.rds"
  )
}

# Final save
write.csv(
  decontx_metrics,
  "results/decontx/decontx_batch_metrics.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

saveRDS(
  decontx_estimates_all,
  "results/decontx/decontx_estimates_all.rds"
)

saveRDS(
  decontx_corrected_cluster_labels,
  "results/decontx/decontx_corrected_cluster_labels.rds"
)

decontx_metrics

# FigS11. DecontX detection performance across scenarios

p_decontx_spearman <- ggplot(
  decontx_metrics,
  aes(
    x = actual_mean_frac,
    y = spearman_true_vs_decontx,
    group = factor(soup_gene_n),
    shape = factor(soup_gene_n)
  )
) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_line() +
  theme_white +
  labs(
    title = "DecontX per-cell contamination detection",
    x = "Mean simulated ambient RNA fraction",
    y = "Spearman correlation with ground truth",
    shape = "Ambient genes"
  )

p_decontx_bias <- ggplot(
  decontx_metrics,
  aes(
    x = actual_mean_frac,
    y = decontx_mean_estimate - true_mean_fraction,
    group = factor(soup_gene_n),
    shape = factor(soup_gene_n)
  )
) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_line() +
  theme_white +
  labs(
    title = "Mean contamination estimate bias",
    x = "Mean simulated ambient RNA fraction",
    y = "Mean DecontX estimate - true mean",
    shape = "Ambient genes"
  )

p_decontx_detection_batch <- p_decontx_spearman | p_decontx_bias

ggsave(
  "figures/FigS11_DecontX_detection_across_scenarios.png",
  p_decontx_detection_batch,
  width = 12,
  height = 4.8,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

p_decontx_detection_batch

# FigS12. DecontX correction performance across scenarios

decontx_improve_long <- rbind(
  data.frame(
    scenario = decontx_metrics$scenario,
    soup_gene_n = decontx_metrics$soup_gene_n,
    actual_mean_frac = decontx_metrics$actual_mean_frac,
    metric = "Global RMSE improvement",
    value = decontx_metrics$improvement_all_genes
  ),
  data.frame(
    scenario = decontx_metrics$scenario,
    soup_gene_n = decontx_metrics$soup_gene_n,
    actual_mean_frac = decontx_metrics$actual_mean_frac,
    metric = "HVG RMSE improvement",
    value = decontx_metrics$improvement_hvg500
  ),
  data.frame(
    scenario = decontx_metrics$scenario,
    soup_gene_n = decontx_metrics$soup_gene_n,
    actual_mean_frac = decontx_metrics$actual_mean_frac,
    metric = "Soup-gene RMSE improvement",
    value = decontx_metrics$improvement_soup_genes
  ),
  data.frame(
    scenario = decontx_metrics$scenario,
    soup_gene_n = decontx_metrics$soup_gene_n,
    actual_mean_frac = decontx_metrics$actual_mean_frac,
    metric = "Marker leakage reduction",
    value = decontx_metrics$marker_leakage_reduction
  )
)

p_decontx_correction_batch <- ggplot(
  decontx_improve_long,
  aes(
    x = actual_mean_frac,
    y = value,
    group = factor(soup_gene_n),
    shape = factor(soup_gene_n)
  )
) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_point(size = 3, na.rm = TRUE) +
  geom_line(na.rm = TRUE) +
  facet_wrap(~ metric, scales = "free_y", ncol = 2) +
  theme_white +
  labs(
    title = "DecontX correction performance across simulated ambient RNA scenarios",
    x = "Mean simulated ambient RNA fraction",
    y = "Improvement or reduction relative to no correction",
    shape = "Ambient genes"
  )

ggsave(
  "figures/FigS12_DecontX_correction_across_scenarios.png",
  p_decontx_correction_batch,
  width = 12,
  height = 7,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

p_decontx_correction_batch

# FigS13. Clustering stability before and after DecontX

ari_long <- rbind(
  data.frame(
    scenario = decontx_metrics$scenario,
    soup_gene_n = decontx_metrics$soup_gene_n,
    actual_mean_frac = decontx_metrics$actual_mean_frac,
    method = "No correction",
    ARI_vs_clean = decontx_metrics$no_correction_ARI_vs_clean
  ),
  data.frame(
    scenario = decontx_metrics$scenario,
    soup_gene_n = decontx_metrics$soup_gene_n,
    actual_mean_frac = decontx_metrics$actual_mean_frac,
    method = "DecontX",
    ARI_vs_clean = decontx_metrics$decontx_ARI_vs_clean
  )
)

p_decontx_ari <- ggplot(
  ari_long,
  aes(
    x = actual_mean_frac,
    y = ARI_vs_clean,
    group = interaction(method, soup_gene_n),
    shape = factor(soup_gene_n),
    linetype = method
  )
) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_line() +
  theme_white +
  labs(
    title = "Clustering stability before and after DecontX correction",
    x = "Mean simulated ambient RNA fraction",
    y = "ARI compared with clean clustering",
    shape = "Ambient genes",
    linetype = "Method"
  )

ggsave(
  "figures/FigS13_DecontX_clustering_ARI_across_scenarios.png",
  p_decontx_ari,
  width = 8,
  height = 5.5,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

p_decontx_ari


# Report-ready DecontX summary table

decontx_report_table <- decontx_metrics %>%
  select(
    soup_gene_n,
    target_frac,
    actual_mean_frac,
    spearman_true_vs_decontx,
    pearson_true_vs_decontx,
    improvement_all_genes,
    improvement_hvg500,
    improvement_soup_genes,
    marker_leakage_reduction,
    no_correction_ARI_vs_clean,
    decontx_ARI_vs_clean,
    ARI_change_after_decontx
  ) %>%
  arrange(soup_gene_n, target_frac)

write.csv(
  decontx_report_table,
  "results/decontx/decontx_report_table.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

decontx_report_table
```

### CellBender real-data comparison
```{r}
# # CellBender attempted but excluded from quantitative benchmark
run_cellbender_h5_analysis <- FALSE
dir.create("results/cellbender", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

cellbender_attempt_summary <- data.frame(
  method = "CellBender",
  status = "Attempted but not included in quantitative benchmark",
  input_data = "PBMC4K raw droplet H5 matrix",
  attempted_environment = "Python 3.10, CellBender 0.3.2, torch 2.1.2, numpy 1.26.4",
  attempted_command = paste(
    "cellbender remove-background",
    "--input data/PBMC4K_raw/pbmc4k_raw_gene_bc_matrices_h5.h5",
    "--output results/cellbender/pbmc4k_cellbender_quick.h5",
    "--expected-cells 5000",
    "--total-droplets-included 8000",
    "--epochs 20",
    "--fpr 0.01",
    "--cpu-threads 4"
  ),
  failure_point = "Checkpoint saving after training",
  failure_message = "TypeError: cannot pickle 'weakref.ReferenceType' object; checkpoint file ckpt.tar.gz did not exist; H5 output was not generated",
  interpretation = "CellBender was not used for quantitative downstream benchmarking because local execution failed before posterior H5 output generation.",
  log_file = "results/cellbender/cellbender_quick_run_torch212.log"
)

write.csv(
  cellbender_attempt_summary,
  "results/cellbender/cellbender_attempt_summary.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

cellbender_attempt_summary
```

### SoupX benchmark as second executable ambient RNA correction method

```{r}
# SoupX benchmark as second executable ambient RNA correction method

library(SoupX)
library(Matrix)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(patchwork)
library(mclust)

dir.create("results/soupx", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create("figures", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

if (!exists("sim_list")) {
  sim_list <- readRDS("results/simulated/simulated_ambient_datasets.rds")
}

if (!exists("clean_counts")) {
  clean_counts <- get_assay_data(pbmc, "counts")
}

if (!exists("no_correction_metrics")) {
  no_correction_metrics <- read.csv(
    "results/metrics/no_correction_metrics.csv",
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

if (!exists("no_correction_cluster_metrics")) {
  no_correction_cluster_metrics <- read.csv(
    "results/metrics/no_correction_cluster_metrics.csv",
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

if (!exists("contaminated_cluster_labels")) {
  contaminated_cluster_labels <- readRDS(
    "results/metrics/no_correction_contaminated_cluster_labels.rds"
  )
}

clean_clusters <- as.character(Idents(pbmc))
names(clean_clusters) <- colnames(pbmc)

hvg500 <- head(VariableFeatures(pbmc), 500)

monocyte_leakage_genes <- intersect(
  c("LYZ", "S100A8", "S100A9", "FCGR3A", "MS4A7", "CST3"),
  rownames(clean_counts)
)

if (!exists("monocyte_source_scores")) {
  monocyte_source_scores <- read.csv(
    "results/simulated/monocyte_source_cluster_scores.csv",
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

monocyte_source_scores$cluster <- as.character(monocyte_source_scores$cluster)

monocyte_like_clusters <- monocyte_source_scores$cluster[
  seq_len(min(3, nrow(monocyte_source_scores)))
]

recipient_cells <- names(clean_clusters)[
  !(clean_clusters %in% monocyte_like_clusters)
]

# Construct pseudo raw droplets for SoupX
make_pseudo_raw_for_soupx <- function(
    sim,
    n_empty = 3000,
    mean_empty_umi = 50,
    seed = 1
) {
  set.seed(seed)
  
  toc <- as(sim$contaminated, "dgCMatrix")
  
  soup_counts <- Matrix::rowSums(sim$ambient)
  
  # If ambient matrix is too sparse, use soup genes uniformly
  if (sum(soup_counts) == 0) {
    soup_counts[sim$soup_genes] <- 1
  }
  
  soup_genes <- intersect(sim$soup_genes, rownames(toc))
  
  soup_prob <- as.numeric(soup_counts[soup_genes])
  
  if (sum(soup_prob) == 0) {
    soup_prob <- rep(1, length(soup_genes))
  }
  
  soup_prob <- soup_prob / sum(soup_prob)
  
  empty_sizes <- rpois(n_empty, lambda = mean_empty_umi)
  empty_sizes[empty_sizes < 1] <- 1
  
  ii_list <- vector("list", n_empty)
  jj_list <- vector("list", n_empty)
  xx_list <- vector("list", n_empty)
  
  soup_idx <- match(soup_genes, rownames(toc))
  
  for (j in seq_len(n_empty)) {
    draw <- as.vector(rmultinom(1, size = empty_sizes[j], prob = soup_prob))
    nz <- which(draw > 0)
    
    ii_list[[j]] <- soup_idx[nz]
    jj_list[[j]] <- rep(j, length(nz))
    xx_list[[j]] <- draw[nz]
  }
  
  empty_mat <- Matrix::sparseMatrix(
    i = unlist(ii_list),
    j = unlist(jj_list),
    x = unlist(xx_list),
    dims = c(nrow(toc), n_empty),
    dimnames = list(
      rownames(toc),
      paste0("EMPTY_", seq_len(n_empty))
    )
  )
  
  tod <- Matrix::cbind2(toc, empty_mat)
  
  list(
    tod = tod,
    toc = toc
  )
}

# Run SoupX in batches
soupx_metrics <- data.frame()
soupx_corrected_cluster_labels <- list()

for (name in names(sim_list)) {
  message("============================================================")
  message("Running SoupX for scenario: ", name)
  message("============================================================")
  
  sim <- sim_list[[name]]
  
  pseudo <- make_pseudo_raw_for_soupx(
    sim = sim,
    n_empty = 3000,
    mean_empty_umi = 50,
    seed = 9000 + which(names(sim_list) == name)
  )
  
  tod <- pseudo$tod
  toc <- pseudo$toc
  
  sc <- SoupChannel(
    tod = tod,
    toc = toc
  )
  
  z <- contaminated_cluster_labels[[name]]
  z <- z[colnames(toc)]
  
  if (any(is.na(z))) {
    stop("Some cells do not have cluster labels for SoupX scenario: ", name)
  }
  
  sc <- setClusters(sc, z)
  
  # Manual-rho SoupX:
  # Use the designed target contamination fraction, not per-cell true fractions.
  sc <- setContaminationFraction(
    sc,
    contFrac = sim$target_frac,
    forceAccept = TRUE
  )
  
  soupx_counts <- adjustCounts(
    sc,
    roundToInt = TRUE
  )
  
  soupx_counts <- as(soupx_counts, "dgCMatrix")
  rownames(soupx_counts) <- rownames(toc)
  colnames(soupx_counts) <- colnames(toc)
  
  baseline_row <- no_correction_metrics[
    no_correction_metrics$scenario == name,
  ]
  
  baseline_cluster_row <- no_correction_cluster_metrics[
    no_correction_cluster_metrics$scenario == name,
  ]
  
  soup_genes <- intersect(sim$soup_genes, rownames(clean_counts))
  
  soupx_rmse_all_genes <- calc_rmse_sparse(
    clean_counts,
    soupx_counts
  )
  
  soupx_rmse_hvg500 <- calc_rmse_sparse(
    clean_counts,
    soupx_counts,
    genes = hvg500
  )
  
  soupx_rmse_soup_genes <- calc_rmse_sparse(
    clean_counts,
    soupx_counts,
    genes = soup_genes
  )
  
  soupx_marker_leakage <- calc_mean_marker_counts(
    soupx_counts,
    genes = monocyte_leakage_genes,
    cells = recipient_cells
  )
  
  message("Running Seurat clustering on SoupX-corrected counts for: ", name)
  
  soupx_obj <- run_seurat_basic(
    counts = soupx_counts,
    project_name = paste0("SoupX_", name)
  )
  
  soupx_clusters <- as.character(Idents(soupx_obj))
  names(soupx_clusters) <- colnames(soupx_obj)
  
  common_cells <- intersect(names(clean_clusters), names(soupx_clusters))
  
  soupx_ari_vs_clean <- mclust::adjustedRandIndex(
    clean_clusters[common_cells],
    soupx_clusters[common_cells]
  )
  
  scenario_metrics <- data.frame(
    scenario = name,
    method = "SoupX_manual_rho",
    source_cluster = sim$source_cluster,
    soup_gene_n = sim$soup_gene_n,
    target_frac = sim$target_frac,
    actual_mean_frac = mean(sim$true_frac),
    
    no_correction_rmse_all_genes = baseline_row$rmse_all_genes,
    soupx_rmse_all_genes = soupx_rmse_all_genes,
    improvement_all_genes = safe_improvement(
      baseline_row$rmse_all_genes,
      soupx_rmse_all_genes
    ),
    
    no_correction_rmse_hvg500 = baseline_row$rmse_hvg500,
    soupx_rmse_hvg500 = soupx_rmse_hvg500,
    improvement_hvg500 = safe_improvement(
      baseline_row$rmse_hvg500,
      soupx_rmse_hvg500
    ),
    
    no_correction_rmse_soup_genes = baseline_row$rmse_soup_genes,
    soupx_rmse_soup_genes = soupx_rmse_soup_genes,
    improvement_soup_genes = safe_improvement(
      baseline_row$rmse_soup_genes,
      soupx_rmse_soup_genes
    ),
    
    clean_marker_leakage = baseline_row$clean_marker_leakage,
    no_correction_marker_leakage = baseline_row$contaminated_marker_leakage,
    soupx_marker_leakage = soupx_marker_leakage,
    marker_leakage_reduction = safe_reduction(
      baseline_row$clean_marker_leakage,
      baseline_row$contaminated_marker_leakage,
      soupx_marker_leakage
    ),
    
    no_correction_ARI_vs_clean = baseline_cluster_row$ARI_vs_clean,
    soupx_ARI_vs_clean = soupx_ari_vs_clean,
    ARI_change_after_soupx = soupx_ari_vs_clean -
      baseline_cluster_row$ARI_vs_clean,
    
    top_soup_genes = paste(head(sim$soup_genes, 10), collapse = ";")
  )
  
  soupx_metrics <- rbind(
    soupx_metrics,
    scenario_metrics
  )
  
  soupx_corrected_cluster_labels[[name]] <- soupx_clusters
  
  write.csv(
    soupx_metrics,
    "results/soupx/soupx_metrics_partial.csv",
    row.names = FALSE
  )
}

write.csv(
  soupx_metrics,
  "results/soupx/soupx_metrics.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

saveRDS(
  soupx_corrected_cluster_labels,
  "results/soupx/soupx_corrected_cluster_labels.rds"
)

soupx_metrics

# Draw a comparison chart of DecontX vs. SoupX
if (!exists("decontx_metrics")) {
  decontx_metrics <- read.csv(
    "results/decontx/decontx_batch_metrics.csv",
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

method_correction_long <- rbind(
  data.frame(
    method = "DecontX",
    scenario = decontx_metrics$scenario,
    soup_gene_n = decontx_metrics$soup_gene_n,
    actual_mean_frac = decontx_metrics$actual_mean_frac,
    metric = "Global RMSE improvement",
    value = decontx_metrics$improvement_all_genes
  ),
  data.frame(
    method = "SoupX",
    scenario = soupx_metrics$scenario,
    soup_gene_n = soupx_metrics$soup_gene_n,
    actual_mean_frac = soupx_metrics$actual_mean_frac,
    metric = "Global RMSE improvement",
    value = soupx_metrics$improvement_all_genes
  ),
  data.frame(
    method = "DecontX",
    scenario = decontx_metrics$scenario,
    soup_gene_n = decontx_metrics$soup_gene_n,
    actual_mean_frac = decontx_metrics$actual_mean_frac,
    metric = "HVG RMSE improvement",
    value = decontx_metrics$improvement_hvg500
  ),
  data.frame(
    method = "SoupX",
    scenario = soupx_metrics$scenario,
    soup_gene_n = soupx_metrics$soup_gene_n,
    actual_mean_frac = soupx_metrics$actual_mean_frac,
    metric = "HVG RMSE improvement",
    value = soupx_metrics$improvement_hvg500
  ),
  data.frame(
    method = "DecontX",
    scenario = decontx_metrics$scenario,
    soup_gene_n = decontx_metrics$soup_gene_n,
    actual_mean_frac = decontx_metrics$actual_mean_frac,
    metric = "Soup-gene RMSE improvement",
    value = decontx_metrics$improvement_soup_genes
  ),
  data.frame(
    method = "SoupX",
    scenario = soupx_metrics$scenario,
    soup_gene_n = soupx_metrics$soup_gene_n,
    actual_mean_frac = soupx_metrics$actual_mean_frac,
    metric = "Soup-gene RMSE improvement",
    value = soupx_metrics$improvement_soup_genes
  ),
  data.frame(
    method = "DecontX",
    scenario = decontx_metrics$scenario,
    soup_gene_n = decontx_metrics$soup_gene_n,
    actual_mean_frac = decontx_metrics$actual_mean_frac,
    metric = "Marker leakage reduction",
    value = decontx_metrics$marker_leakage_reduction
  ),
  data.frame(
    method = "SoupX",
    scenario = soupx_metrics$scenario,
    soup_gene_n = soupx_metrics$soup_gene_n,
    actual_mean_frac = soupx_metrics$actual_mean_frac,
    metric = "Marker leakage reduction",
    value = soupx_metrics$marker_leakage_reduction
  )
)

p_method_correction <- ggplot(
  method_correction_long,
  aes(
    x = actual_mean_frac,
    y = value,
    group = interaction(method, soup_gene_n),
    linetype = method,
    shape = factor(soup_gene_n)
  )
) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_point(size = 2.5, na.rm = TRUE) +
  geom_line(na.rm = TRUE) +
  facet_wrap(~ metric, scales = "free_y", ncol = 2) +
  theme_white +
  labs(
    title = "Correction performance of DecontX and SoupX",
    x = "Mean simulated ambient RNA fraction",
    y = "Improvement or reduction relative to no correction",
    linetype = "Method",
    shape = "Ambient genes"
  )

ggsave(
  "figures/FigS14_DecontX_SoupX_correction_comparison.png",
  p_method_correction,
  width = 12,
  height = 7,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

p_method_correction

#  DecontX vs SoupX clustering graph
method_ari_long <- rbind(
  data.frame(
    method = "No correction",
    scenario = decontx_metrics$scenario,
    soup_gene_n = decontx_metrics$soup_gene_n,
    actual_mean_frac = decontx_metrics$actual_mean_frac,
    ARI_vs_clean = decontx_metrics$no_correction_ARI_vs_clean
  ),
  data.frame(
    method = "DecontX",
    scenario = decontx_metrics$scenario,
    soup_gene_n = decontx_metrics$soup_gene_n,
    actual_mean_frac = decontx_metrics$actual_mean_frac,
    ARI_vs_clean = decontx_metrics$decontx_ARI_vs_clean
  ),
  data.frame(
    method = "SoupX",
    scenario = soupx_metrics$scenario,
    soup_gene_n = soupx_metrics$soup_gene_n,
    actual_mean_frac = soupx_metrics$actual_mean_frac,
    ARI_vs_clean = soupx_metrics$soupx_ARI_vs_clean
  )
)

p_method_ari <- ggplot(
  method_ari_long,
  aes(
    x = actual_mean_frac,
    y = ARI_vs_clean,
    group = interaction(method, soup_gene_n),
    linetype = method,
    shape = factor(soup_gene_n)
  )
) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  geom_line() +
  theme_white +
  labs(
    title = "Clustering stability across correction methods",
    x = "Mean simulated ambient RNA fraction",
    y = "ARI compared with clean clustering",
    linetype = "Method",
    shape = "Ambient genes"
  )

ggsave(
  "figures/FigS15_DecontX_SoupX_clustering_ARI.png",
  p_method_ari,
  width = 9,
  height = 5.5,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

p_method_ari

# Final method status table
method_status_table <- data.frame(
  method = c("DecontX", "SoupX", "CellBender"),
  category = c(
    "Probabilistic modeling",
    "Profile subtraction",
    "Deep generative raw-droplet model"
  ),
  run_status = c(
    "Completed",
    "Completed",
    "Attempted; H5 output not generated"
  ),
  quantitative_benchmark = c(
    "Yes",
    "Yes",
    "No"
  ),
  input_used = c(
    "Simulated contaminated filtered PBMC count matrices with cluster labels",
    "Simulated contaminated PBMC matrices with pseudo raw droplets and manual rho",
    "PBMC4K raw droplet H5 matrix"
  ),
  evaluation = c(
    "Ground-truth contamination correlation, RMSE, marker leakage, ARI",
    "RMSE, marker leakage, ARI",
    "Workflow and limitation discussion only"
  ),
  main_limitation_observed = c(
    "Weak per-cell contamination recovery, especially for single-gene contamination",
    "Manual contamination fraction used; not evaluated for per-cell contamination detection",
    "Checkpoint serialization failed repeatedly, preventing posterior H5 output generation"
  )
)

write.csv(
  method_status_table,
  "results/method_status_table.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

method_status_table
```

### method comparison table
```{r}
main_method_table <- data.frame(
  Method = c("DecontX", "SoupX", "CellBender"),
  Strategy = c(
    "Probabilistic contamination model",
    "Profile subtraction",
    "Deep generative raw-droplet model"
  ),
  Input = c(
    "Filtered count matrix + clusters",
    "Pseudo raw droplets + contaminated cells",
    "Raw droplet H5 matrix"
  ),
  Project_evaluation = c(
    "Ground-truth detection and correction benchmark",
    "Manual-rho correction benchmark",
    "Attempted workflow; no H5 output"
  ),
  Main_limitation = c(
    "Weak per-cell recovery in this simulation",
    "Target contamination fraction was supplied",
    "Checkpoint serialization failed locally"
  )
)

write.csv(
  main_method_table,
  "results/main_method_table.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

main_method_table

```
